data.title: Eating chili peppers may raise the risk of one deadly cancer
data.summary: A major review found that people who consumed the most chili peppers had a substantially higher risk of esophageal cancer, though the evidence was less clear for stomach and colorectal cancers.

data.title: ‘Explosive diarrhoea’ outbreak grips US: how researchers are hunting its source
